title: 1st Place — National Rocketry Championship
detail: AETHER-I took top honors in the collegiate solid-motor division.

title: Finalist — TechGC Innovation Summit
detail: SAST's autonomous rover concept was one of six finalists nationwide.

title: Published — Undergraduate Aerospace Review
detail: The VORTEX drag-reduction study was accepted for publication.

title: Founded
detail: SAST was founded by a small group of students with one workshop and a shared obsession with flight.
